reasoning: Pixel art UI panel asset inspected at 4x and 8x zoom. Overall structure is consistent pixel art style with clean rounded corners and regular inner dot pattern. GRADIENT SHADING: The golden border exhibits 4+ distinct tone bands rather than clean 2-3 hard tones, suggesting AI-blended shading rather than hand-placed pixel dithering. ASYMMETRY: Top icon row arrangement (crossed-swords, red gem, blue gem, teal gem, red gem) lacks the bilateral symmetry expected from hand-crafted pixel art UI. Left corner decoration differs subtly from right in exact pixel placement at 8x. COLOR BLEED: Small gem icons show 1-2px color contamination at their outer edges that bleeds into the golden border background — consistent with AI upscaling artifacts. NO MELTING or SEMANTIC FAILURE detected; the panel reads correctly as a game UI button. SUB-PIXEL: At 8x the corner AA steps are clean integer pixels. OUTLINE: Dark outline is consistently 1px throughout, no missing or double-width sections. NOISE: Solid gray interior is noise-free. Net assessment: gradient shading and icon asymmetry are the primary flags — marginal pass, not clean enough for pass but no single catastrophic tell warrants outright fail.
